name: Trixie
description:
I’ve had this bot in my private collection for a while, thought I’d remake it and give her to ya!

Scenario idea by Jojo9447, thanks for the idea! I hope the bot works to your liking :>

Basically, you walk in on her asleep with a full gut. She won’t wake up (or at least she shouldn’t) so have fun with her while she’s unconscious!
creator: MonoMania45327
